PCT_FREE_CAMERA_DESC: Cycle through player targets using SPACE (JUMP) / Move around freely using WSAD/Joystick
PCT_PATH_CAMERA_DESC: Set pathpoints using CROUCH + FIRE, then start the camera to move along the pathpoints
PCT_THIRDPERSON_CAMERA_DESC: Camera that tracks you in thirdperson view
PCT_SPACE_TO_CYCLE_TARGET: JUMP to cycle target  |  WASD/Joystick to free move  |  SPRINT to increase speed  |  USE to exit
PCT_PATH_POINTS_STATUS_READY: Ready to Add or Select Point
PCT_CONTROL_NOTICE_INACTIVE_1: CROUCH + FIRE: Add Point/Select  |  PRONE + FIRE: Start Camera Loop
PCT_CONTROL_NOTICE_INACTIVE_2: Tip: Aim and fire at a point to select it, then Move/Delete
PCT_CONTROL_NOTICE_ACTIVE_1: USE: Toggle the Portal Cinematic Toolkit UI. Disable HUD in BF6 options menu for HUD-less camera
PCT_CONTROL_NOTICE_ACTIVE_2: Tip: Use WASD/Joystick to navigate the left menu and JUMP to select buttons
PCT_MOVE_POINT_TIP: Tip: ZOOM/AIM to move the point farther/closer
